#  Edit an RFI in Portfolio Financials 
#####  Legacy
This information is intended for accounts with [Portfolio Financials](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/portfolio-financials/) product in Procore. Please reach out to your Procore point of contact for more information.
##  Background 
The RFIs page in the Bid Room is a powerful tool that allows you to manage RFIs from your vendors and keep information consistent across all bidders. You can edit an RFI question or answer even after it is posted.
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions** :
    * 'Limited' access to the project or higher.  
_Note:_ Users with 'Limited' access must be on the Bid Room Team for the project.


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the **Bid Room** you want to manage RFIs for.
  2. Click the **RFIs** tab.
  3. Click the RFI that you want to edit.
  4. Click **Edit**.  
  
![Edit Rfi](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/ffce74320ad0e340287e569971621ddd/ae2304d95336ec1d2ebabc89073703e4/edit-rfi.png?fm=webp)  

  5. Make any necessary changes to the RFI.
  6. Click **Save**.


## See Also
  * [Portfolio Financials - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/portfolio-financials/permissions)
  * [Restore a Deleted RFI in Portfolio Financials](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/portfolio-financials/tutorials/restore-a-deleted-rfi-in-portfolio-financials)
  * [Post an RFI in Portfolio Financials](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/portfolio-financials/tutorials/post-an-rfi-in-portfolio-financials)
title: Edit an RFI in Portfolio Financials
description: How to edit an RFI that was posted in a Bid Room in Portfolio Financials.
